page: Google Cloud Platform c4d-standard-32 is a general-purpose server instance configured with 32 dedicated vCPUs and 124.0 GB of system memory. Built on the x86_64 CPU architecture, this instance allocates approximately 3.88 GB of RAM per virtual core. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that compute resources are fully assigned to the instance, preventing resource contention from neighboring tenants.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Additionally, it does not provide complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The balanced ratio of compute to memory positions this hardware profile for workloads that require consistent CPU performance alongside moderate memory capacity, such as web serving, application servers, and general-purpose business applications.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4d-standard-32 is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 124.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 3.88 GB per vCPU. This instance operates with dedicated CPU allocation to deliver predictable compute performance without shared-core resource contention. It does not contain local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring network-attached storage for data persistence. Lacking complimentary public IPv4 addresses, it is designed for secure internal architectures. The balanced resource distribution makes this instance suitable for general-purpose workloads, including application servers, containerized microservices, and web serving environments that require steady-state processing power without the need for specialized hardware accelerators.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c4d-standard-32 is an x86_64 general-purpose server featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs, 124 GB of RAM, and no local storage or GPUs, designed for balanced compute workloads.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 compute instance featuring thirty-two virtual cores and a balanced memory configuration for consistent general-purpose workloads.

No integrated GPUs or local storage included
Designed for general-purpose workloads and application hosting
